task_completion.description: Load the CBCT scan from the specified DICOM directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blue Sky Plan software interface showing loaded 3D/radiographic views (axial, coronal, sagittal) of a patient's jaw.

task_completion.description: Create an appropriate panoramic curve alignment
task_completion.visual_evidence: A panoramic view generated in the software, showing a defined curve (usually a colored line with control points) drawn along the patient's dental arch in the axial view.

task_completion.description: Map the inferior alveolar nerve to ensure adequate clearance
task_completion.visual_evidence: A colored tube or line (typically yellow or red) drawn within the mandible on the cross-sectional, panoramic, or 3D views representing the mapped inferior alveolar nerve on the right side.

task_completion.description: Place a single dental implant in the lower right posterior jaw
task_completion.visual_evidence: A virtual 3D implant model visible in the lower right posterior region (first molar area), shown in the cross-sectional, panoramic, or 3D views, positioned safely away from the mapped nerve.

task_completion.description: Save the treatment plan to complete_plan.bsp
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file explorer window, or the software title bar confirming the project has been saved as 'complete_plan.bsp' in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BlueSkyPlanTasks\.

task_completion.description: Export a presentation-ready screenshot of the plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer showing 'complete_plan_screenshot.png' in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BlueSkyPlanTasks\, or a save/export dialog confirming the creation of this specific image file.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blue Sky Plan GUI to perform the planning
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Blue Sky Plan 5.0 interface (clicking tools, adjusting views) rather than just terminal commands or script execution.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with actual patient CBCT data
integrity.visual_evidence: The anatomical views show genuine dental anatomy (teeth, bone structure) corresponding to a real CBCT scan, not a generic placeholder or blank screen.

integrity.description: Output files were genuinely created by the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The .bsp and .png files appear in the file explorer with appropriate icons and non-zero file sizes, indicating they are real exports and not empty dummy files created via terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires placing an implant in the lower right first molar region. Note a metadata contradiction: 'tooth_number' specifies 30, which is lower left in FDI notation but lower right in Universal notation. Ensure the implant is placed in the lower RIGHT posterior jaw. The expected implant manufacturer is BlueSkyBio with a 4.0mm diameter. The DICOM data must be loaded from C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DentalDICOM.
